title: Networking
subtitle: Inspect local OpenClaw instances and keep gateway connectivity visible in one place.
description: This OpenClaw-only networking view surfaces the registry-linked runtimes already managed inside Claw Studio so you can verify gateway endpoints, WebSocket exposure, and ACP routing readiness before agents go online.
loadFailedDescription: We could not read the local OpenClaw registry snapshot right now.
emptyTitle: No OpenClaw instances are registered yet
emptyDescription: Install or register an OpenClaw runtime first. Once it is available locally, this page will show its gateway endpoint, WebSocket entry, storage namespace, and route readiness.
noDescription: This OpenClaw runtime is already registered locally and ready for connectivity review.
